title: OTR-derived triple-barrier multiples (OU fit / heat-potential closed form)
source: LdP newer-corpus verification (4 parallel read-only agents over the added 2012-2026 papers + LdP REFERENCE CODE in D:/PROJECTS/QuantTradingDocs/code, 2026-06-03). Conversation: 'verifica la nueva informacion antes de implementar'.
why: Our triple-barrier multiples (tp_atr_mult=3.0, sl_atr_mult=1.0, horizon=40) are hand-set. LdP's 'Determining Optimal Trading Rules Without Backtesting' (2014) + code/OTR.py derive tp/sl WITHOUT backtesting: fit a discrete Ornstein-Uhlenbeck to the PnL/price process (OLS, half-life HL = -ln2/ln phi), then a Monte-Carlo mesh over (PT,SL) pairs picks the Sharpe-maximizing corridor. The 2020 'closed-form optimal mean-reverting trading' paper gives an analytic solution (heat potentials) — no MC needed. CRITICAL falsification value: the paper proves that for a near-random-walk (large HL, phi->1) 'there is no optimal trading rule' — so an OU fit on XAU D1 is also a diagnostic of whether our barrier geometry is even well-posed.
value_rationale: Replaces hand-set/arbitrary barriers with a data-derived, overfit-resistant choice AND yields a falsifiable 'is there an edge corridor' test. Directly relevant given MEMORY barrier_geometry_root_cause.
scope: Fit discrete OU (OLS of dP on (E[P]-P_{t-1})) to XAU D1; report phi, half-life, sigma — per vol-regime (rv_regime already segments)
If OU distinguishable from random walk: run OTR.py MC mesh (or 2020 heat-potential closed form) to nominate tp/sl multiples; compare vs current 3.0/1.0/40
If indistinguishable from random walk: record as a finding (current barriers partly arbitrary; no stable OTR exists)
OTR governs the EXIT corridor of an open position (not entry) — it cleanly replaces the triple-barrier TP/SL the labeler uses
recommendation: High value: principled barriers + a falsification diagnostic. Start with the OU fit; the closed form (2020) is the fast path if OU holds.
out_of_scope: Entry-threshold determination (OTR is exit-corridor only). Per-trade live sizing (B0001).

history.reason: verification: OTR derives tp/sl from OU fit without backtesting; replaces hand-set 3.0/1.0/40 + falsification diagnostic
